subject: Bad news: New numbers just released

body:

| ****EMERGENCY: Campaign Spending Numbers Released****

---

---|---|---
---
| Dear Friend,

This is bad.

I need your help immediately -- now more than ever.

I don't have much time to explain...but here is -- the BREAKING NEWS directly from _**NBC**_ , and it's not good.

**With just weeks before voting starts in Iowa and then New Hampshire, I am being heavily outspent by my opponents. Look at the new numbers _NBC_ news just released below:**

| >> | Team Bush: $49 million ($47.5M from his Super PAC, $1.5M from the campaign)

---|---
>> | Team Rubio: $25.6 million ($9.3M from a 501c4, $9M from campaign, $7.3M from the Super PAC)

>> | Team Clinton: $13.8 million ($13.6M from her campaign, $199K from her Super PAC)

>> | Team Kasich: $10.1 million ($9.9M from outside groups, $208K from his campaign)

>> | Team Sanders: $9.6 million (all from his campaign)

>> | Team Christie: $9.3 million ($8.9M from a Super PAC, $407K from his campaign)

>> | Team Carson: $4 million ($3.8M from his campaign, $200K from the Super PAC)

>> | Team Cruz: $2 million ($1.3M from our campaign, the rest from Super PACs)

_**(Source: NBC News)**_

You read that right. The Bush and Rubio teams have spent over $60 million dollars, and so far, we have spent less than $2 million.

[**I'm asking you to help me make up this difference today -- can you help?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32774415:sV6HKZyN7:m:1:1104269936:D67027C3754CE6B7F4497D72AB024130:r)

Friend, you are one of my most loyal supporters, and when my campaign needs help -- and we need BIG help today -- I turn to my closest friends first.

I have only weeks before the first votes are cast in Iowa -- then New Hampshire and South Carolina -- and we can't afford to be overwhelmed on the airwaves.

**I'm personally writing you today to ask you to help me close this HUGE spending gap with a special "Close the Gap" contribution to my campaign.**

Below are special, secure links I have put together just for you to help at this critical time.

Will you click one of the links below and give a special gift today?

**[I'LL CLOSE THE GAP - $10](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32774416:sV6HKZyN7:m:1:1104269936:D67027C3754CE6B7F4497D72AB024130:r)

[I'LL CLOSE THE GAP - $35](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32774417:sV6HKZyN7:m:1:1104269936:D67027C3754CE6B7F4497D72AB024130:r)

[I'LL CLOSE THE GAP - $50](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32774418:sV6HKZyN7:m:1:1104269936:D67027C3754CE6B7F4497D72AB024130:r)

[I'LL CLOSE THE GAP - $100](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32774419:sV6HKZyN7:m:1:1104269936:D67027C3754CE6B7F4497D72AB024130:r)

[I'LL CLOSE THE GAP - $250](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32774420:sV6HKZyN7:m:1:1104269936:D67027C3754CE6B7F4497D72AB024130:r)

[I'LL CLOSE THE GAP - OTHER AMOUNT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32774421:sV6HKZyN7:m:1:1104269936:D67027C3754CE6B7F4497D72AB024130:r)**

One last thing: I want you to know that my campaign has put together the best grassroots, on the ground, door-to-door and overall campaign organization in history. We have a HUGE advantage over these big spenders in shoe leather and campaign targeting.

_But we can't afford to be utterly overwhelmed on the airwaves -- and it's my job to make sure we can make up this gap with only days before voting starts._

And that's why I'm turning to you today.

[**Please, will you help me make up this spending gap with a special gift by CLICKING HERE today?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32774415:sV6HKZyN7:m:1:1104269936:D67027C3754CE6B7F4497D72AB024130:r) We WILL win this election -- and restore America's greatness.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

---
**I 'm pleased to announce that my beloved wife Candy has written her first solo book.

**It's called **A DOCTOR IN THE HOUSE,** and Candy will be donating all her proceeds to charity.

This memoir takes us from her childhood in Detroit to our first meeting at Yale, to her time as a musician and her efforts to help children.

She includes many stories about our family that have never been told publicly before.

I may be biased, but others agree that the book is full of warmth, humor, and grace -\- just like Candy herself.

Candy is only doing a couple of book-signing events, but you can get a free autographed "bookplate" sticker from the publisher.

**Please visit**[**www.candycarsonbook.com**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32754668:WtLfHZycN:m:1:876315805:A1590AB02340DBEEBE426A545F2C94AC:r)**for details about the book, events, and signed bookplate.**

Thank you for your time.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: Cruzin' to Caucus
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
Hello Friend,

Here we are -- 2016! I hope your new year is off to a fantastic
start and you're fired up about electing Ted to be our next
president this year! To start off 2016, I wanted to share a note
with you that I sent to our staff just a few days ago that
highlights what we've accomplished together since launching the
campaign at Liberty University on March 23rd:

Financial strength:

We concluded 2015 raising almost $47 million.
Our Super PACs have been reported to be the second
best funded of the GOP field.
We received over 690,000 donations with an average
donation of just over $67.

These donors cover 66% of all zip codes in the
United States.
Over 10,000 of our donors are "sustainers" who
committed to contribute on an automatic, monthly basis, and
provide enough recurring revenue ($500,000 a month) to fund for
our entire field operation.

An unrivaled political organization:
Emphasizing our commitment to running a national
campaign, we have announced State Leadership Teams, 1,400 strong
in membership, in Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, Nevada,
Georgia, Alabama, Arkansas, North Carolina, New Jersey, Oklahoma,
Tennessee, Texas, Virginia, Mississippi, Minnesota, Florida,
Arizona, Michigan, and Washington. We've also announced State
Chairs in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Wyoming, Idaho, and
California.
In the first four primary and caucus states: Iowa, New
Hampshire, South Carolina, and Nevada, we've built a team that is
the envy of the GOP field with county chairmen in place in all
171 counties. And after the first four states, we have
congressional district coordinators in place in each of the 163
congressional districts that comprise the 24 states that hold
their primary or caucus before March 15th. We are also actively
recruiting precinct chairmen to serve in each of these states to
mobilize supporters as it comes time to vote or caucus.
Additionally, our leadership teams have access to over
175,000 volunteers across the nation who have signed up to help
make Ted Cruz our next president. Many of those volunteers have
already joined our Strike Force at Camp Cruz where we are housing
our volunteers in Iowa. They are working 12 hour shifts and
exceeding their nightly call and door-knocking goals. Camp Cruz
has been such a great success we're opening a second dorm to
expand our Strike Force in Iowa, and we will be taking the Strike
Force to New Hampshire.
We're also recruiting members of diverse coalitions to
support Ted. To date, over 29,000 Americans from all walks of
life have signed up to join our Veterans and Military,
Millennials, Teens, Liberty Leaders, African Americans, Small
Business, Faith Leaders, Pro-Life, Women, Hispanic, Home
Schoolers, Lawyers, Second Amendment, Tea Party, Sportsmen, and
Farmers coalitions.
Coalescing Courageous Conservatives:
Recently, Brent Bozell wrote in Breitbart to say, "Ted
Cruz is surging. He's on top in Iowa. He's gaining ground
everywhere else. He has organizations in place in every state
that matters... It's time for the movement to rally around Ted
Cruz, to make him the next president of the United States."
And that's exactly what we're seeing happen. We have seen
conservative leaders both nationally, and in early primary and
caucus states go all in for Ted. Leaders like Brent Bozell, Shane
Vander Haart, Manny Roman, Ken Cuccinelli, Dr. James Dobson, the
National Organization for Marriage, Bob Vander Plaats, Alan
Steinberg, Richard Viguerie, Andrew McCarthy, Ann-Marie Murrell,
Troy Newman, Ginni Thomas, Rep. Steve King, Dr. Michael Brown,
Judge Paul Pressler, former Rep. Bob Barr, Gun Owners of America,
the National Federation of Republican Assemblies, Ron Robinson,
Rep. Jim Bridenstine, and so many more.
As influential Iowa radio host Steve Deace said in his
endorsement video "I think [Ted Cruz] is our best chance to
preserve American exceptionalism for the next generation... do
not wait until the end. Ted Cruz has already put together the
resources, the resume and the organization it takes to move the
country back to liberty. Let's get on board now, let's unite now
so that we can take on Washington, D.C. tomorrow."
What the press is saying about our campaign:
Cruz has Trump, and the rest of the field, beat on
organization. - Politico
Ted Cruz has assembled an impressive presidential
campaign structure in Iowa, veteran political observers here say,
with one going so far as to describe Cruz's campaign as perhaps
"the most sophisticated" the first-in-the-nation caucus state has
ever witnessed. - Cedar Rapids Gazette
Republican presidential candidate Ted Cruz is making a
big bet on building a strong organization outside of the four
early voting states of Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and
Nevada. - Nashville Public Radio
Cruz is widely regarded as the most deeply organized
candidate in the South, a region that will have outsize influence
in 2016, as many of the states vote on the same day. - Politico
The Cruz campaign combines a traditional get-out-the-vote
operation - making phone calls and knocking on doors - with
modern data analytics to identify and mobilize supporters,
beginning with Iowa on Feb. 1. - Associated Press
The anti-establishment angst that Cruz stokes may have
left him isolated in the Senate, but it has also fueled his
campaign on the road, where he has cultivated an almost cult-like
base that views him as a lone wolf with the courage to stand up
to Republican Party leaders they believe are no longer fighting
for them. - Bloomberg
The months ahead:
Some campaigns are focused solely on a man, some on a
movement. Ours is a hybrid of the two built to win. We have
brought together, and continue to build, a grassroots army of
courageous conservatives committed to electing Ted Cruz to
reignite the promise of America. Just under a month away from the
start of the caucuses and primaries we have a network in place
with the resources required to win that is the envy of every
other campaign.
There's still plenty of work to be done to make Ted the
Republican nominee and the next President, but as we begin 2016,
we are exactly where we want to be. Go. Fight. Win.
This is OUR time!
Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President
P.S. On Monday, we kick off the #CruzinToCaucus Bus Tour
in Iowa. If you're in the area, we hope you'll join us. Click
here to find out where you can meet Ted and to RSVP.

Press Clips

Ted Cruz's Fundraising Jumps in 4th Quarter
Wall Street Journal

At Trump South Carolina rally, rival Cruz casts long
shadow
Reuters

Ted Cruz tours North Texas tornado damage
WFAA

Cruz returns to Iowa with bus tour Monday
Associated Press

Cruz Courts Christians at Faith Gathering
TIME

Ted Cruz continues Lone Star stop with West Texas rally
Dallas Morning News

Ted Cruz Scores Another Influential Endorsement in Iowa
NBC News

Does the GOP Establishment Think Ted Cruz is a RINO in
Conservative Sheep's Clothing?
PJ Media

New Ted Cruz Ad Puts Focus on Religious Liberty
Caffeinated Thoughts

Tony Dolan on Max Boot on Ted Cruz
Commentary

Cruz is Playing the Media Perfectly
National Review

Why the Establishment Fears Cruz More than Trump
Conservative Review

Ad: Ted Cruz 'Defended the cross -- and won.'
Washington Examiner

YouGov: Head to head, Rubio now trails Trump by eight and
Cruz by 18
Hot Air

House rebels crusade for Cruz
Politico

Cruz taps evangelicals, tea partiers to fuel campaign
Associated Press

I Endorse Ted Cruz for President
Caffeinated Thoughts

Cruz in control in Iowa
Cedar Rapids Gazette

Ted Cruz's Iowa Ad Offers Conservatives Red Meat on God
and Guns
New York Times

CRUZ VIDEOS

Courageous Conservatives
Reigniting the Promise of America

What the press is saying about our campaign: Cruz has Trump, and the rest of the field, beat on organization. - Politico Ted Cruz has assembled an impressive presidential campaign structure in Iowa, veteran political observers here say, with one going so far as to describe Cruz's campaign as perhaps "the most sophisticated" the first-in-the-nation caucus state has ever witnessed. - Cedar Rapids Gazette Republican presidential candidate Ted Cruz is making a big bet on building a strong organization outside of the four early voting states of Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada. - Nashville Public Radio Cruz is widely regarded as the most deeply organized candidate in the South, a region that will have outsize influence in 2016, as many of the states vote on the same day. - Politico The Cruz campaign combines a traditional get-out-the-vote operation - making phone calls and knocking on doors - with modern data analytics to identify and mobilize supporters, beginning with Iowa on Feb. 1. - Associated Press The anti-establishment angst that Cruz stokes may have left him isolated in the Senate, but it has also fueled his campaign on the road, where he has cultivated an almost cult-like base that views him as a lone wolf with the courage to stand up to Republican Party leaders they believe are no longer fighting for them. - Bloomberg The months ahead: Some campaigns are focused solely on a man, some on a movement. Ours is a hybrid of the two built to win. We have brought together, and continue to build, a grassroots army of courageous conservatives committed to electing Ted Cruz to reignite the promise of America. Just under a month away from the start of the caucuses and primaries we have a network in place with the resources required to win that is the envy of every other campaign. There's still plenty of work to be done to make Ted the Republican nominee and the next President, but as we begin 2016, we are exactly where we want to be. Go. Fight. Win. This is OUR time! subject: I'm on Team Kasich
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, I'm excited to share with you that I am officially endorsing John Kasich for President of the United States.

I have known John for 25 years and am proud to call him my friend. He has done a great job leading Ohio's comeback, and I believe he is needed now to do the same for our country as the next President.

**Will you do two things for me right now that will help John?**

**1.** [Consider a generous contribution of $25 or more to help fund the critical grassroots programs](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32779102:WGMY9ZyNV:m:1:958431888:D104016C619E5DF87CFFD71D7126059A:r) that John will need to win in New Hampshire and go on to defeat Hillary.

**2.** Forward this email to five or more friends and family members and ask them to join the team today: [JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32779103:WGMY9ZyNV:m:1:958431888:D104016C619E5DF87CFFD71D7126059A:r).

When John was elected in 2010, he faced an $8 billion budget shortfall and an economy in shambles thanks to Ted Strickland. Despite the fact that he left Ohio in an absolute mess, Ted moved back to the Buckeye State to run against me for U.S. Senate. Ohioans can't afford a return to Ted Strickland's Ohio!

John and I worked hard to help Ohioans get our state back on track and the same common sense, conservative policies that are working in Ohio can work in Washington. I have worked with John and his team on countless job creation projects across our state and look forward to working with President Kasich to help America be strong and safe.

John Kasich has the experience we need in the White House and he can defeat Hillary Clinton. With your support, he will be our next President.

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

**Rob Portman**
U.S Senator (OH)
National & Ohio Co-Chair, Team Kasich

Friends,

**This is the third article in the past two weeks that 's called us one of the top races in 2016.**

name: John Podesta, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Add your name if you agree with Hillary and President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
To be very clear: | Friend --

It’s not every day a sitting president says in the _New York Times_ that he might not be able to support his own party’s nominee, but that’s exactly what President Obama did this week. He said he’d refuse to endorse any candidate who doesn’t support commonsense gun violence prevention -- like stripping away the gun manufacturer legal immunity that Bernie Sanders supported.

**[If you agree with Hillary and President Obama that gun violence prevention needs to be one of the most important issues in this campaign, add your name to say so right now.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ0Mjg3ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMDQ5MjkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Democrats have a clear choice when it comes to gun violence prevention. As First Lady, Hillary advocated strongly for the landmark Brady Bill. Bernie Sanders voted against it five times. In 2005, Bernie Sanders voted for a bill to shield gun manufacturers from lawsuits. Hillary Clinton and Barack Obama both voted against it. The bill passed with Sanders’ support -- and Wayne LaPierre of the NRA called it "the most significant piece of pro-gun legislation in 20 years." And just a few months ago, Sanders said he doesn't apologize for that vote.

Hillary is the candidate with the best policy on gun violence prevention and the strongest record of being a progressive who gets things done -- that's why the Brady Center to Prevent Gun Violence recently honored her with its first ever lifetime leadership award.

**If you stand with Hillary and President Obama on gun violence prevention, add your name right now, and let’s make sure this stays a core issue in this election:** | [ | [**I'm with her**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ0Mjg3ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxMDQ5MjkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

John

clean_body: To be very clear: | Friend -- It’s not every day a sitting president says in the New York Times that he might not be able to support his own party’s nominee, but that’s exactly what President Obama did this week. He said he’d refuse to endorse any candidate who doesn’t support commonsense gun violence prevention -- like stripping away the gun manufacturer legal immunity that Bernie Sanders supported. Democrats have a clear choice when it comes to gun violence prevention. As First Lady, Hillary advocated strongly for the landmark Brady Bill. Bernie Sanders voted against it five times. In 2005, Bernie Sanders voted for a bill to shield gun manufacturers from lawsuits. Hillary Clinton and Barack Obama both voted against it. The bill passed with Sanders’ support -- and Wayne LaPierre of the NRA called it "the most significant piece of pro-gun legislation in 20 years." And just a few months ago, Sanders said he doesn't apologize for that vote. Hillary is the candidate with the best policy on gun violence prevention and the strongest record of being a progressive who gets things done -- that's why the Brady Center to Prevent Gun Violence recently honored her with its first ever lifetime leadership award. If you stand with Hillary and President Obama on gun violence prevention, add your name right now, and let’s make sure this stays a core issue in this election:** | --- ]() Thanks, John John Podesta Chair Hillary for America | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors. name: Becky Bond, Bernie 2016
subject: Bernie wants to talk to you
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
This campaign has always been about winning. We set out to build a political movement and organize massive voter turnout necessary for victory. With your help we're doing just that -- organizing in record numbers in every state in the nation.
As a result -- and to the disbelief of the corporate media and the political establishment -- **Bernie is on the verge of scoring historic upsets in Iowa and New Hampshire.**
On January 23, Bernie wants to deliver a live video message to you, his hardest working supporters. With just a week before the Iowa caucus, followed soon after by the New Hampshire primary, it will be time to get focused with laser precision on the work necessary to pull off victory in the early states and beyond.
**Whether it's at home with a few friends or in a public venue with a few hundred, will you help organize this giant event for Bernie?**
**[Yes, I will host an event for Bernie's address on January 23!](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2bad/43f17890/441992ea/620f8064/297043980/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/jan23livestreamhost?source=em160109host-full")**
**[I can't host, but I
want to watch
on January 23.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2bad/43f17890/441992ea/620f8065/297043980/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/jan23livestreamattend?source=em160109attend-full")**
Democrats will win the 2016 presidential election if massive numbers of voters turn out, including voters who too often sit out on Election Day. Bernie, backed by millions of active supporters, is our best chance for winning the White House.
The inspiring work you've been doing to share Bernie's message with voters has put victory within reach. But if we're going to help Bernie win the nomination there's much more to do.
Bernie is going to lay that out for us on January 23. **Whether it's at a local theater, library meeting room, pub, or a volunteer's living room, Bernie wants to talk to you at 6 PM Eastern / 5 PM Central / 3 PM Pacific.**
We want as many supporters as possible to have a chance to gather with fellow volunteers and hear Bernie's message.
There will be a live stream for you to tune into to hear Bernie deliver a special message directly to supporters. If you can host an event -- either at a public venue or at your home -- we need you to get more info and sign up today.
If you can't host an event, please save the date and we'll be sending you information soon about events near you.
**[Yes, I will host an event for Bernie's nationwide address to supporters on January 23.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2bad/43f17890/441992ea/620f8064/297043980/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/jan23livestreamhost?source=em160109host-full")**
Or,
**[I can't host an event, but I want to watch Bernie's special address to supporters on January 23.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2bad/43f17890/441992ea/620f8065/297043980/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/jan23livestreamattend?source=em160109attend-full")**
**The impossible is within reach** -- and Bernie is going to explain what he needs us to do to bring victory home in key early contests. Please save the date for an important address from Bernie at a crucial moment in this historic campaign.
In solidarity,
Becky Bond
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2bad/43f17890/441992ea/620f8062/297043980/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em160109jan23-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2bad/43f17890/441992ea/620f8063/297043980/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2bad/43f17890/441992ea/620f8060/297043980/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2bad/43f17890/441992ea/620f806e/297043980/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
